ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND A SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-04-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laralei Paras of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Petitioner Peter Englander.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
